data.title: OpenEden, FalconX, and Monarq jointly launched the tokenized yield portfolio PRISM.
data.description: OpenEden, in a post on the X platform, announced the upcoming launch of PRISM, a tokenized yield portfolio in partnership with FalconX and Monarq. This product aims to achieve stable returns across market cycles and maintain a low correlation with cryptocurrency prices through a multi-strategy quantitative model actively managed by Monarq. PRISM's investment strategies include spot-to-futures arbitrage, over-collateralized lending to institutional counterparties, participation in on-chain yield platforms, and allocation to regulated tokenized real-world assets, including US Treasury-backed assets. Yields will be distributed through a staking mechanism, allowing users to stake PRISM to earn xPRISM, a value-accumulating certificate reflecting portfolio performance over time. The product is currently based on the Ethereum network and will gradually expand to more networks. PRISM has a limited pre-deposit activity prior to its launch.

data.title: GameStop appears to have transferred all its on-chain BTC to Coinbase Prime.
data.description: According to market sources, GameStop is suspected of transferring all its on-chain BTC to Coinbase Prime, or it may be selling them. (Cointelegraph) It is reported that between May 14th and 23rd, 2025, GameStop purchased 4,710 Bitcoins at an average price of $1.079 million, representing an investment of approximately $504 million. If sold at a price of $90,800, this could result in a loss of approximately $76 million.

data.title: Analysis: Ethereum mainnet activity has surpassed many L2 servers, but this may be related to the rise of address poisoning attacks.
data.description: Data shows that Ethereum's daily active addresses rebounded in January, briefly surpassing major Layer 2 networks, driven by lower transaction fees. According to Token Terminal, Ethereum's daily active addresses approached 1 million this month, briefly rising to approximately 1.3 million on January 16th, before falling back to around 950,000. However, analysts warn that the active address data may be overestimated. Security researcher Andrey Sergeenkov pointed out that the January address growth is highly correlated with attacks such as address poisoning, where attackers send extremely small stablecoin transfers to numerous wallets, causing fake addresses to appear in victims' transaction records, thus inducing them to transfer funds unnecessarily. Overall, Ethereum mainnet activity does show signs of recovery, but short-term data contains a large amount of non-genuine demand, and the quality of the on-chain "recovery" remains to be seen. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Regulatory Changes to Boost Bitcoin and Ether ETFs
data.description: New regulatory relaxations are poised to enhance the influence of Bitcoin and Ether ETFs by easing options trading restrictions. According to NS3.AI, these changes are anticipated to boost market participation, liquidity, and investor flexibility. The update indicates a potential expansion of crypto investment products and improved accessibility for both retail and institutional investors.

data.title: Tristan Thompson Launches Innovative Basketball Prediction Platform
data.description: Tristan Thompson, a veteran NBA player, has unveiled basketball.fun, a groundbreaking prediction market platform. According to NS3.AI, this platform enables users to trade leading basketball athletes akin to financial assets. The initiative combines sports statistics with market speculation, offering a unique approach to engaging with basketball.

data.title: Bitget has launched Ubisoft SPACE and FIGHT perpetual contracts.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USD-based SPACE and FIGHT perpetual contracts, with leverage ratios ranging from 1 to 20 times. Contract trading bots will also be available at the same time.

data.title: A whale deposited 1.53 million USDC into Hyperliquid and then purchased XAUT.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale deposited 1.53 million USDC into Hyperliquid to purchase XAUT. It has already purchased 481.6 XAUT and still holds 1.44 million USDC, and may further increase its holdings.

data.title: Bitcoin's Key Support and Resistance Levels Identified by Analyst
data.description: A cryptocurrency analyst, known as @alicharts, has identified crucial price points for Bitcoin. According to Odaily, the analyst highlighted that Bitcoin's key support level is at $87,400, while the critical resistance level is at $98,400.

data.title: Significant Transfer of PAXG Tokens Observed Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: A notable transfer of PAXG tokens has been recorded, involving a substantial amount of cryptocurrency. According to ChainCatcher, at 20:13 UTC+8, a total of 1340.06 PAXG was moved from one anonymous address, beginning with 0xDa09, to another anonymous address, starting with 0x1aA9. This transaction highlights the ongoing activity within the cryptocurrency market, where large transfers between anonymous entities are not uncommon.

data.title: The American Bankers Association plans to block interest-paying stablecoins.
data.description: The American Bankers Association has listed "preventing stablecoins from generating yields" as its top lobbying goal for 2026. The association argues that interest-bearing stablecoins could become a substitute for bank deposits, potentially leading to trillions of dollars flowing out of the traditional banking system, weakening banks' lending capacity and jeopardizing their core role in the financial system. In response, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire countered at the Davos Forum, calling concerns about stablecoin yields affecting bank deposits "completely absurd," pointing out that yields can enhance user stickiness and that stablecoins will become an essential payment system for AI agents conducting large-scale transactions in the future. Opponents argue that this move aims to protect bank interests, restrict fintech innovation, and put the dollar at a disadvantage in competition with China's digital yuan. (Cryptopolitan)

data.title: Farcaster Refunds Early Backers Amid Crypto Social Media Consolidation
data.description: Farcaster has issued refunds to its early backers as the crypto social media sector experiences consolidation. According to NS3.AI, this development indicates a shift towards centralization within decentralized communication platforms. The article underscores the changing dynamics in crypto social networks, marking a phase of realignment for these projects.

data.title: A whale bought 566.8 XAUT tokens from the CEX over the past two days, worth nearly $2.8 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale bought 566.8 XAUT tokens from CEX in the past two days, worth nearly $2.8 million. The whale also holds 11.36 million USDT and may further increase its holdings.

data.title: Eleven Wall Street analysts predict that Strategy's stock price target may exceed $440 this year.
data.description: According to predictions from 11 Wall Street analysts, the year-to-date price target for Bitcoin treasury company Strategy may be $440.82, while its current share price is in the $160 range. (BTCTreasuries)

data.title: US Stock Futures Decline as Traders Seek Safe-Haven Assets
data.description: US stock index futures experienced a downturn, prompting traders to gravitate towards safe-haven assets such as gold and silver. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum options data revealed a bearish sentiment, with short-term and near-term put options priced higher than those for Bitcoin, reflecting cautiousness towards ETH. In contrast, certain altcoins, including LayerZero's ZRO token, TRX, and DASH, recorded modest gains in anticipation of upcoming upgrades and growing market interest.

data.title: Spark Increases Savings Limits on Ethereum and Avalanche
data.description: DeFi lending protocol Spark has announced an increase in the savings limits for its Spark Vaults on the X platform. According to Odaily, the USDC limit on the Ethereum blockchain will be raised to $1 billion, while the USDC limit on the Avalanche blockchain will increase to $500 million. Additionally, the ETH limit will be raised to 250,000 units.

data.title: Spark raises storage limits to expand vault size; ETH cap increases to 250,000.
data.description: DeFi lending protocol Spark announced on the X platform that it will raise the savings limits for Spark Vaults, including an increase in the USDC limit on the Ethereum chain to $1 billion, the USDC limit on the Avalanche chain to $500 million, and the ETH limit to 250,000.

data.title: The second season of the Aster AI battle has been launched on the Aster Chain testnet.
data.description: Aster announced on its X platform that the second season of the human-AI battle officially started last night and went live on the Aster Chain testnet. Currently, 100 human and AI contestants have started trading, including 70 human traders and 30 AI agents. The season will last for seven days, and the AI ​​has reportedly been upgraded this season.

data.title: Shenzhen Prosecutors Charge 30 in Major Financial Fraud Case
data.description: The Shenzhen People's Procuratorate has charged Sui Guangyi, Ma Xiaoqiu, and 28 others with crimes such as fundraising fraud, illegal public deposit absorption, and money laundering. According to NS3.AI, the accused allegedly utilized Ding Yifeng Asset Management and its affiliated companies to engage in illegal fundraising activities through deceptive financial products and 'DDO Digital Options' air tokens. Authorities have confiscated properties, vehicles, equities, and frozen bank accounts associated with the suspects.

data.title: Tim Draper Reflects on Early Bitcoin Investments and Vision
data.description:
Tim Draper, founder of Draper Associates and a renowned investor, shared insights on the X platform about his early experiences with Bitcoin. According to Odaily, Draper revealed that his initial purchase of Bitcoin was at a price of $4 per coin. His investment was driven not by an understanding of the technology or foresight into its future, but by the belief in digital currency's potential to transform the lives of those without access to traditional banking.

Draper recounted participating in a U.S. Marshals auction, where he successfully bid on 30,000 Bitcoins at $632 each, slightly above the market price of $618 at the time. Despite a subsequent drop in Bitcoin's value to $180, Draper remained committed to holding his investment. He emphasized his conviction that Bitcoin is not merely an investment but a tool capable of changing the global financial landscape.

data.title: White House Encryption Council Chief: Encryption Structures Act Passage is Only a Matter of Time; Now is the Best Legislative Window
data.description: Patrick Witt, head of the White House Crypto Committee, posted on the X platform that the newly released draft of the Senate Agriculture Committee's Crypto Market Structure Bill is a high-quality bipartisan collaboration. Its text is more than 80% similar to the House CLARITY bill. It has already received the support of a majority of Democrats on the Agriculture Committee and nearly 40% support in the House Democratic caucus. He also emphasized that under the regulatory environment of Trump and the crypto community, crypto market structure legislation is "only a matter of time." If the current window of opportunity is missed, a more stringent and punitive regulatory framework may be faced in the future.
